RegLoan Bank — Auto Loan Credit Application Document APP-0007 Page 1 of 1 Applicant Name: Omar Silva Date of Birth: 13/02/1977 SSN (tokenized): [REDACTED] Annual Income: $127,000 Loan Amount: $53,000 Branch: Austin Employment: [x] Full-time [x] Self-employed Housing: [ ] Own [ ] Rent Collateral (Vehicle) VIN Make Model Year Fuel Cond Value ($) VIN65111AL Kia Sportage 2017 EV CPO 49,000 VIN45232AL Hyundai Corolla 2021 ICE New 39,000 Authorized Signature: Omar Silva
